$comment: Opt-in curated Claude Code permission baseline for repositories that import this template. See docs/permissions.md#claude-code-permission-baseline before adopting it. This baseline deliberately excludes merge-capable operations by default: no `gh pr merge` allow, and a deny on `node scripts/idd-merge-execute.mjs` / `node bin/idd-merge-execute.mjs` so the broad scripts/bin helper allow below does not casually reintroduce that same merge capability via --apply -- see docs/permissions.md for this deny's known path-alias limitation (it is not adversarial-proof, only a default-off guard). Add `gh pr merge` and remove that deny yourself only after your repository records `fully_autonomous_merge` (see docs/permissions.md#merge-policy-profiles). `gh api` is deliberately NOT allowlisted here at all -- see the gh-api DELETE-verb trap in docs/permissions.md before adding any `gh api` entry yourself. Personal additions belong in .claude/settings.local.json, which layers on top of this file.
